See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 35672 => 'GO Mobile', 35677 => 'Melita Mobile', 35679 => 'GO Mobile', 35692 => 'epic', 3569696 => 'epic', 356981 => 'Melita Mobile', 356988 => 'GO Mobile', 356989 => 'epic', 35699 => 'epic', ];
